title: No More Crafting Table
description: This is a challenge you can beat the game without the crafting table!
body:
![no crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e2a155196a445489138755759fd0a52e85e89ba.png)
This remove crafting table recipe so you cant use it this would be a challage it possable to beat the game with outever using the crafting table!
